"com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "SQLite", "TSQL" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Remove unused `source_data` column mappings and associated migration definitions across all mapping classes and database schema files.
Remove `ImportOption` feature and associated uses across projects, update snapshot handling logic, and clean up related classes and tests.
Update `ILogixDb` interface to include `ArchiveSnapshot` and `AppendSnapshot` methods, modify snapshot handling in `ImportCommand`, and update corresponding tests.

Refactor snapshot handling: replace `AddSnapshot` with `ArchiveSnapshot` and `AppendSnapshot`, update related tests and logic. Remove unused `DeleteSnapshotContent`. Add `AssertRecordDoesNotExist` helper in test fixtures.
Replace `AddSnapshot` with `ArchiveSnapshot` in tests, update assertions to reflect updated snapshot handling logic.
Refactor snapshot handling: standardize table filtering and ordering logic in `PruneLatestSnapshot`, rename methods for clarity, and update associated tests.
Streamline `GetTableNames` constant by removing unused filtering logic and simplify SQL query. Update corresponding references and tests.
Replace `ArchiveSnapshot` and `AppendSnapshot` with unified `AddSnapshot` method across projects, update related tests, and improve snapshot handling logic.
Update `PruneSnapshotsAsync` to use `GetAllAsync` instead of `GetAsync` in both SQLite and SQL Server implementations for consistent snapshot retrieval.
Add new `SyncCommand` to sync PLC tag data into the database and create a new snapshot.
Bump project versions to 0.9.0 for LogixDb.Service and LogixDb.Cli.
Update README to refine configuration instructions, expand setting descriptions, and improve example clarity.

Bump project versions to 0.9.1, update `L5Sharp` dependency to v6.0.5, and refactor database configuration methods for clarity and consistency. Updated SqlServerDb.cs and SqlServerDbWriter.cs to prevent log growth as much as possible
Refactor delete and get snapshot methods to use version-based logic, update SQL queries for consistency, and revise related tests to reflect changes.

Refactor migration scripts to replace `WithRequiredRelation` and `WithOptionalRelation` with unified `WithParentRelation`. Add snapshot-related updates for consistency across tables and schema mapping. Bump CLI version to 0.10.0.
Add `snapshot_id` column and relevant foreign key constraints to migration tests for improved schema consistency and validation.
Introduce `snapshot_instance` table to track restored snapshots, update SQL logic for snapshot handling, and refine migration scripts for consistency.

Performed major refactor of Snapshot.cs to Target.cs and updated core database tables to support version history and instance expantion. Updated CLI. Updated abstractions, migrations, tests, and moved static SQL code to scripts.
Replaced snapshot with target for documentation and variable names

Replace `WithInstanceRelation`, `WithParentRelation`, and `WithVersionRelation` with a unified `WithRelation` method and update migration scripts to enhance consistency and enforce cascade rules for foreign key relations.
Refactor transaction handling in `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager`, improve `Target.Compile` logic, and add comprehensive unit tests for `Target`.
Update migration scripts to use generic `WithRelation<T>` method for foreign key definitions, enhancing type specificity and consistency across tables.
Refactor SQL scripts for improved readability and consistency, standardizing formatting and simplifying complex queries where applicable.
Update `GetTargetByLatest.sql` to rename aliases for clarity and consistency in SQL query
Update workspace configuration to remove stale changes and add task `LOCAL-00185` tracking SQL script refactoring.
Remove unused dependencies and obsolete methods, refactor test assertions for clarity, and improve naming consistency in SourceIngestionService and related tests.
Remove `MigrationRequiredException` as it is no longer used.
Remove `DatabaseProvider` and `IDbProvider` as they are no longer used.
Simplify and clarify CLI command descriptions; add required attributes for better validation consistency.
Refactor database managers to handle missing targets explicitly; streamline SQL script execution; add comprehensive CLI command tests.
Refactor `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` to use explicit dependencies, improve logging, streamline SQL script handling, and add comprehensive CLI command tests.
Update README with refined command descriptions, improved schema documentation, and clarified usage examples.
Add new test classes for SQL Server and SQLite to validate `RestoreTarget` functionality; update existing tests to ensure proper exception handling for non-existent targets.
Replace `GetDatabaseSizeInBytes` helper with `GetDatabaseSize` in tests for consistency; standardize size outputs in MB; update related test assertions and console logs.
Update dependencies across projects and switch to `UploadAsync` in `SyncCommand` for consistency.
Bump project versions to 0.10.1 in Service and CLI.
Fix incorrect dependency injection for `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` in `Extensions.cs`.
Bump project versions to 0.10.2 in Service and CLI.
Add `AddLogixDbTests` to validate service registration for SQLite and SQL Server managers
Refactor `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` in SQL Server and SQLite managers to extract `CompileTargetDataAsync`, improving readability and error handling; bump project versions to 0.10.3.
Refactor `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` in SQL Server and SQLite managers to improve data table compilation and bulk writing; fix typos in SQL scripts; bump project versions to 0.10.4.
Update dependencies across projects; bump test frameworks and core package versions to improve stability and compatibility. Adjust `TagTransformer` logic for tighter type validation.
Bump project versions to 0.10.5 in Service and CLI.

Remove `target_instance` table and references; replace with `version_map` table for improved version relationship handling. Refactor migration scripts, update schemas, and adjust related SQL and mappings.
Remove redundant `using System.Data` directives and refactor migration index definitions for improved consistency and streamlined schema design.

Remove `ArchiveCommand`, `PostCommand`, `RestoreCommand`, and related tests and SQL scripts to simplify CLI functionality. Refactor database schema migrations and remove unused entity references for streamlined design.
Refactor migrations: update column types, modify key definitions, and add `tag_value` table for enhanced schema consistency.
Fix migration attribute timestamp in `M202602130930CreateTagValueTable` to ensure proper ordering.
Delete `SqlDbPruneTargetTests` and `SqliteDbPruneTargetTests`; add SQL scripts for merging data types, members, and routines; refactor `Target` to update `VersionId` type to `int`.

MESSAGE.value: Update workspace configuration to remove stale changes and add task `LOCAL-00185` tracking SQL script refactoring.
Remove unused dependencies and obsolete methods, refactor test assertions for clarity, and improve naming consistency in SourceIngestionService and related tests.
Remove `MigrationRequiredException` as it is no longer used.
Remove `DatabaseProvider` and `IDbProvider` as they are no longer used.
Simplify and clarify CLI command descriptions; add required attributes for better validation consistency.
Refactor database managers to handle missing targets explicitly; streamline SQL script execution; add comprehensive CLI command tests.
Refactor `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` to use explicit dependencies, improve logging, streamline SQL script handling, and add comprehensive CLI command tests.
Update README with refined command descriptions, improved schema documentation, and clarified usage examples.
Add new test classes for SQL Server and SQLite to validate `RestoreTarget` functionality; update existing tests to ensure proper exception handling for non-existent targets.
Replace `GetDatabaseSizeInBytes` helper with `GetDatabaseSize` in tests for consistency; standardize size outputs in MB; update related test assertions and console logs.
Update dependencies across projects and switch to `UploadAsync` in `SyncCommand` for consistency.
Bump project versions to 0.10.1 in Service and CLI.
Fix incorrect dependency injection for `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` in `Extensions.cs`.
Bump project versions to 0.10.2 in Service and CLI.
Add `AddLogixDbTests` to validate service registration for SQLite and SQL Server managers
Refactor `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` in SQL Server and SQLite managers to extract `CompileTargetDataAsync`, improving readability and error handling; bump project versions to 0.10.3.
Refactor `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` in SQL Server and SQLite managers to improve data table compilation and bulk writing; fix typos in SQL scripts; bump project versions to 0.10.4.
Update dependencies across projects; bump test frameworks and core package versions to improve stability and compatibility. Adjust `TagTransformer` logic for tighter type validation.
Bump project versions to 0.10.5 in Service and CLI.

Remove `target_instance` table and references; replace with `version_map` table for improved version relationship handling. Refactor migration scripts, update schemas, and adjust related SQL and mappings.
Remove redundant `using System.Data` directives and refactor migration index definitions for improved consistency and streamlined schema design.

Remove `ArchiveCommand`, `PostCommand`, `RestoreCommand`, and related tests and SQL scripts to simplify CLI functionality. Refactor database schema migrations and remove unused entity references for streamlined design.
Refactor migrations: update column types, modify key definitions, and add `tag_value` table for enhanced schema consistency.
Fix migration attribute timestamp in `M202602130930CreateTagValueTable` to ensure proper ordering.
Delete `SqlDbPruneTargetTests` and `SqliteDbPruneTargetTests`; add SQL scripts for merging data types, members, and routines; refactor `Target` to update `VersionId` type to `int`.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Delete `SqlDbPruneTargetTests` and `SqliteDbPruneTargetTests`; add SQL scripts for merging data types, members, and routines; refactor `Target` to update `VersionId` type to `int`.
